title: Aphasia - NHS
text:
online.
There are also national charities that can offer support and information about aphasia.
Stroke Association Information, support and resources for anyone affected by aphasia after a stroke.
Stroke Association: aphasia and communication Stroke helpline: 0303 3033 100 Stroke Association: communication tools Say Aphasia In-person and online support groups, as well as other information and resources, for anyone affected by aphasia.
Website: www.sayaphasia.org Say Aphasia: online drop-in group Aphasia Reconnect Online and in-person support groups and buddying for people with aphasia.
Website: aphasiareconnect.org.uk Phone: 07885 288943 Aphasia Reconnect: find support Aphasia Reconnect: information and resources The Brain Charity Information, and practical and emotional support for people affected by aphasia.
The Brain Charity: aphasia Phone: 0151 298 2999

Next review due: 01 April 2028
